records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when an Iranian racing authority publishes a stable current calendar without restricted access or betting-only dependence.
limitations: The reviewed international federation directory confirms Iranian Arabian-racing membership context but does not provide a domestic meeting calendar.
Third-party racing and prediction portals are not accepted as the canonical public source.
No current meeting fields are approved.
records.notes: Retain an official-context link while a stable authority-owned current calendar remains unconfirmed.
